description: The Kurdish mafia comprises organized crime groups run by ethnic Kurds, operating primarily in Western Asia, Europe, and North America. Their main activities include drug and arms trafficking, contract killing, and migrant smuggling. They have been accused of funneling profits to the PKK and have cooperated with other crime groups. The mafia emerged from banditry during the decline of the Ottoman Empire.

country_links.evidence_quote: Afghanistan was a stronghold of the Kurdish mafia. Kurdish criminals smuggled opiates from Afghanistan into Iranian Kurdistan...
country_links.context: The Kurdish mafia smuggles opiates from Afghanistan and is supplied by the Taliban.

country_links.evidence_quote: In late 2022, the Kurdish mafia had several camps in Calais, which they used to house the migrants they smuggled.
country_links.context: The Kurdish mafia had camps in Calais used to house smuggled migrants and controlled the trafficking route.

country_links.evidence_quote: Kurdish mafia gangs in Germany were also reported to extort German businessmen, making them pay a tax every month in exchange for protection...
country_links.context: Kurdish mafia gangs in Germany extort German businessmen and threaten police.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Kurdish mafia also patrolled the Iran–Turkey border from both sides... and they cooperated with Iranian criminals to facilitate the migrant smuggling.
country_links.context: The Kurdish mafia patrolled the Iran–Turkey border from both sides and cooperated with Iranian criminals to facilitate migrant smuggling.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Kurdish mafia is also active in Sweden, heavily involved in the drug trade but also bombings, assassinations, robberies, and assaults.
country_links.context: The Kurdish mafia is active in Sweden, involved in drug trade, bombings, assassinations, robberies, and assaults.

country_links.evidence_quote: charged Afghan migrants a fee to be smuggled into Turkish cities, including Istanbul.
country_links.context: The Kurdish mafia smuggles migrants into Turkish cities and smuggles opiates through Turkish Kurdistan.

country_links.evidence_quote: A British police report revealed that the Tottenham Boys, a Kurdish gang from London, did funnel their profits to the PKK.
country_links.context: A Kurdish gang from London, the Tottenham Boys, funneled profits to the PKK, indicating a UK footprint.

country_links.evidence_quote: In Nashville, Tennessee, during the 1990s and 2000s, Kurdish organised criminals began operating in the city.
country_links.context: Kurdish organized criminals operated in Nashville, Tennessee, involved in drug distribution and armed burglaries.
